item.title: National Guard troops were quietly withdrawn from some U.S. cities
item.description: The deployments encountered repeated legal setbacks that stymied President Donald Trump’s show of force in Los Angeles, Chicago and Portland, Oregon.

item.title: Vance visits Armenia, Azerbaijan as Trump eyes deals in Russia’s sphere
item.description: The vice president’s historic trip illustrates Trump’s transactional diplomacy and willingness to use economic muscle to elbow out rivals such as Russ...

item.title: In rebuke, House opens door to challenging Trump’s tariffs
item.description: Three Republicans joined Democrats in rejecting an attempt to block votes that would end the national emergency underpinning the president’s tariffs.

item.title: D.C. grand jury declines to indict six Democratic lawmakers
item.description: Federal prosecutors launched an investigation into the lawmakers after they released a short video advising current military members to reject “illega...

item.title: Democratic governors threaten to boycott Trump dinner over exclusions
item.description: The president left some governors, including Maryland’s Wes Moore, off the guest list for an event that has traditionally been bipartisan.
